name: Sally Lunn
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the cake flour once, then measure it out.
2. Add baking powder and salt to the sifted flour.
3. Cream the shortening until smooth.
4. Gradually add sugar while continuing to cream.
5. Combine the egg and milk in a separate bowl.
6. Alternately add small amounts of the egg-milk mixture and the remaining flour to the butter mixture, beating after each addition until well combined.
7. Bake in greased muffin pans or on a baking sheet in a hot oven (425°F) for 25 minutes, or until cooked through.
